ItacPersonItem.Notes: Bon was famous as a numismatist and obtained a degree in civil and canon law in Padua. He joined the Ricovrati in 1678, and was also fellow of the Royal Society in London. In Italy he was also member of the Dodonei (Venice), and Sventati (Udine).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
